zh.lifeSummary: 當Edith Stourton於大約1380年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特時，她的父親John de Stourton48歲，母親Alice32歲。她於大約1409年與Sir John Beauchamp 3rd Baron Beauchamp of Bletsoe在英國英格蘭維爾爾斯圖頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1441年6月13日在英國波克夏法利格頓享年62歲，埋葬在英國肯特坎特布瑞。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edith Stourton于大约1380年出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特时，她的父亲John de Stourton48岁，母亲Alice32岁。她于大约1409年与Sir John Beauchamp 3rd Baron Beauchamp of Bletsoe在英国英格兰維爾爾斯圖頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1441年6月13日在英国波克夏法利格頓享年62岁，埋葬在英国肯特坎特布瑞。

nameMeanings.name: Stourton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: 1  English: locative name from any of three places named Stourton (Staffs, Wilts, Warwicks).
3 English: locative name, perhaps occasionally from Storrington (Sussex), which is recorded as Storgetune in 1086.

variants.name: Sturton
meanings: 1  English: locative name from Sturton le Steeple (Notts), Great Sturton (Lincs), Sturton by Stow (Lincs), or possibly Sturton (Northumb), all of which place-names share the same etymology and early spellings as   Stratton  .

nameMeanings.name: Edith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English female personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + gӯð ‘strife’. This was borne by a daughter ( 961–984 ) of Edgar the Peaceful. (She was named in accordance with the common Old English practice of repeating name elements within a family.) She spent her short life in a convent, and is regarded as a saint.

variants.name: Edythe
meanings: From an Old English female personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + gӯð ‘strife’. This was borne by a daughter ( 961–984 ) of Edgar the Peaceful. (She was named in accordance with the common Old English practice of repeating name elements within a family.) She spent her short life in a convent, and is regarded as a saint.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Edith Stourton was born about 1380, in Somerset, England, United Kingdom, her father, John de Stourton, was 48 and her mother, Alice, was 32. She married Sir John Beauchamp 3rd Baron Beauchamp of Bletsoe about 1409, in Stourton, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 13 June 1441, in Faringdon, Berkshire, England, at the age of 62, and was buried in Canterbury, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edith Stourton est née environ 1380, à Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John de Stourton, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Alice, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Beauchamp 3rd Baron Beauchamp of Bletsoe environ 1409, à Stourton, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 13 juin 1441, à Faringdon, Berkshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterrée à Canterbury, Kent, Angleterre.

de.West Woodhay, Berkshire, England, United: West Woodhay, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Edith Stourton um 1380 in Somerset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Stourton 48 und ihre Mutter Alice 32. Sie hat um 1409 in Stourton, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom Sir John Beauchamp 3rd Baron Beauchamp of Bletsoe geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 13. Juni 1441 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Faringdon, Berkshire, England und wurde in Canterbury, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edith Stourton è nata il circa 1380 nel Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John de Stourton, aveva 48 anni e sua madre, Alice, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Beauchamp 3rd Baron Beauchamp of Bletsoe circa 1409, nel Stourton, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 13 giugno 1441, nel Faringdon, Berkshire, England, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolta a Canterbury, Kent, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Edith Stourtonが約1380年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトで生まれた時，父John de Stourtonは48歳，母Aliceは32歳であった。約1409年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアストウルトンでSir John Beauchamp 3rd Baron Beauchamp of Bletsoeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1441年6月13日にイギリスバークシュアイアファリングドンで62歳で死去し，イギリスケントカンテルブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Edith Stourton(이)가 대략 1380년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Stourton(은)는 48세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 대략 1409년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 스토우르턴에서 Sir John Beauchamp 3rd Baron Beauchamp of Bletsoe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1441년 6월 13일 영국 버크실르 패링던에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 캉르버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edith Stourton nasceu aproximadamente 1380, em Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John de Stourton, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Alice, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Beauchamp 3rd Baron Beauchamp of Bletsoe aproximadamente 1409, em Stourton, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 13 de junho de 1441, em Faringdon, Berkshire, Inglaterra, com 62 anos, e foi sepultada em Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra.

ro.West Woodhay, Berkshire, England, United: West Woodhay, Berkshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edith Stourton родилась около 1380 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John de Stourton было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Beauchamp 3rd Baron Beauchamp of Bletsoe около 1409 г. в местности стоуртон, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 13 июня 1441 г. в местности фарингдон, биркшир, Англия в возрасте 62 лет и была похоронена в местности кантирбури, кэнт, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Edith Stourton nació aproximadamente 1380, en Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John de Stourton, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Alice, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Sir John Beauchamp 3rd Baron Beauchamp of Bletsoe aproximadamente 1409, en Stourton, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 13 de junio de 1441, en Faringdon, Berkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultada en Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra.
